title: Crocodile’s Plan Nears Completion
description: On pages 19–23, this part focuses on crocodile’s plan nears completion, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile’s Plan Nears Completion. The rebellion and royal army rush toward Alubarna as Vivi’s group searches for a way to stop the war before it starts. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: We've sure walked a long way! I'm not really tired at all though...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Let us be off, my U.G. Pirates!

summary: This part develops crocodile’s plan nears completion and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
